testcase.name: test_settlement_act_nonexistent_order_returns_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_return_settlement_documents.py:55: in test_settlement_act_nonexistent_order_returns_404 assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 503 E assert 503 == 404 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_settlement_act_contains_financial_sections
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_return_settlement_documents.py:61: in test_settlement_act_contains_financial_sections assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generate_return_act_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 503 assert 503 in [200, 201, 400, 404, 500] + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_return_settlement_documents.py:94: in test_generate_return_act_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [200, 201, 400, 404, 500], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 503 E assert 503 in [200, 201, 400, 404, 500] E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_returns_access_token
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_return_settlement_documents.py:114: in test_login_returns_access_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Login failed: 503 E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_order_7396_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Order 7396 not found: 503 assert 503 == 200 + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_return_settlement_documents.py:140: in test_order_7396_exists assert response.status_code == 200, f"Order 7396 not found: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Order 7396 not found: 503 E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
